title: Chart With Narrative
chartSubtitle: One chart paired with one concise narrative.

narrativeItems.title: Change drivers
narrativeItems.description: Break key drivers into short points instead of crowding the chart.

narrativeItems.title: Measurement note
narrativeItems.description: Keep definitions and conclusions editable beside the chart.

narrativeItems.title: Next step
narrativeItems.description: Use the conclusion to bridge into the next analysis or action.

summary: Best for one primary chart with concise interpretation; avoid dashboard-style chart collections.
